chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ تَحِلُّ لَهُ الزَّكَاةُ فَيَمْتَنِعُ مِنْ أَخْذِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 44 – The one for whom the Zakāt is Obligated but he refuses from taking it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/116)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/116)

parts.text: عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ هِلَالِ بْنِ خَاقَانَ

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ تَارِكُ الزَّكَاةِ وَ قَدْ وَجَبَتْ لَهُ مِثْلُ مَانِعِهَا وَ قَدْ وَجَبَتْ عَلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Haysam Bin Abu masrouq, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Marwan Bin Muslim, from Abdullah Bin Hilal Bin Khaqan who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullahasws saying: ‘The neglecter of the Zakāt while it has been Obligated for him is like its prevented while it has been Obligated upon him’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Haytham ibn abu Masruq from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Marwan ibn Muslim from ’Abd Allah ibn Hilal ibn Khaqan who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘One who refuses to receive Zakat, when it is obligatory on him to receive is like one who refuses to pay Zakat when it is obligatory on him to pay.”
